Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF with Medicare Part A, B, C, and D, Version 2 │ May 2026 │ V 1.2 10 

BENE_RACE_CD 

LABEL: Beneficiary Race Code 

DESCRIPTION: The race of the beneficiary. 

LONG NAME: BENE_RACE_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) 

VALUES: 0 = Unknown 
1 = White 
2 = Black 
3 = Other 
4 = Asian 
5 = Hispanic 
6 = North American Native 

COMMENT: —
